title: 5. Presets, Personas, and Chat
description: How presets, personas, system prompts, chat context, and ordinary conversation state fit together.

steps.title: Presets Are Starting Points
steps.body: Presets load a saved persona and runtime setup. Use them to switch character style quickly, then adjust details by hand if needed. Use Read steps aloud or Read Step in this tutorial panel if you want spoken guidance while you work.

steps.title: System Prompt
steps.body: The system prompt is the main personality and instruction surface. It shapes what the assistant thinks it is supposed to be doing.

steps.title: Refine System Prompt
steps.body: Right-click the System Prompt field and choose Refine to ask the current chat provider to rewrite the prompt. Refine is only enabled when the prompt has text, and the rewritten prompt replaces the field when it finishes, so review the result before continuing.

steps.title: Voice and Emotion
steps.body: Voice settings and emotion tags decide how text becomes speech and how avatar emotions are requested. Keep your available avatar emotions in mind when designing personas.

steps.title: Chat Context
steps.body: Chat context controls how much conversation history is kept. Save or reset sessions when you want a clean narrative break.

steps.title: Proactive Behavior
steps.body: Proactive replies let NC speak without a direct user message. Keep this conservative until the persona, sensory sources, and interruption style feel right.
